heading: Concurrent resolution essential to authorize investigations
label: 46a Concurrent resolution essential to authorize investigations
text: After , no new investigations shall be initiated by the Commission as the result of a legislative resolution, except the same be a concurrent resolution of the two Houses of Congress.June 16, 1933
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Federal Trade Commission Act which comprises this subchapter.
